Package org.mybatis.generator.codegen

Class CalculatedContextValues

java.lang.Object
org.mybatis.generator.codegen.CalculatedContextValues
public class CalculatedContextValues extends Object
This class holds common objects in a context that can be pre-calculated before code generation runs.
